examples: Few mortals could stick to that harsh regimen, especially for years on end.
She had just that day begun the first of many well-publicized diets: an all-liquid regimen that left her grumpy.
Whatever regimen has been prescribed should be rigorously followed.
An adviser suggested that a vegan regimen would give him more energy and endurance.
Kamdibe discovered he had to take a different approach to his diet and exercise regimen.
